# AlgoFlow Sprint Plan

<!-- Generated by Maestro Sprint Planner (Phase P4) -->
<!-- Covers 5 sprints (0-4), 22 stories, 47 FRs (42 MVP + 5 STRETCH) -->

---

## Sprint 0 -- Scaffold & Environment

**Goal**: Establish the complete development environment, project skeleton, and verify that AlgoKit LocalNet runs and a minimal contract compiles.

**Estimated Effort**: 3-4 hours

**Entry Criteria**:
- Python 3.12+ installed
- Node.js 22.x installed
- Docker installed and running (for AlgoKit LocalNet)
- AlgoKit CLI installed

**Exit Criteria**:
- `algokit localnet start` brings up a healthy local Algorand node
- Empty `PayrollStream(ARC4Contract)` class compiles with `algokit compile python`
- Frontend dev server starts with `npm run dev` and renders a placeholder page
- `.env.example` has all required keys documented
- `.gitignore` excludes `.env`, `node_modules/`, `__pycache__/`, `.venv/`, `dist/`
- `pytest` runs (even with 0 tests) without import errors

**Dependencies**: None (first sprint)

**Risk Assessment**: LOW -- scaffolding is mechanical and well-documented by AlgoKit. Minor risk: AlgoKit CLI version mismatch or Docker issues on the host machine.

### Stories

| Story ID | Title | Complexity | FRs Covered |
|----------|-------|------------|-------------|
| STORY-0-001 | Project scaffold and AlgoKit initialization | M | (Infrastructure -- no FRs) |
| STORY-0-002 | Frontend scaffold with React, Vite, Tailwind | M | (Infrastructure -- no FRs) |

---

## Sprint 1 -- Smart Contract & Token Infrastructure

**Goal**: Implement all 12 MVP contract methods, create the PAYUSD salary token, build deployment scripts, and establish a comprehensive pytest suite.

**Estimated Effort**: 10-12 hours

**Entry Criteria**:
- Sprint 0 exit criteria met
- AlgoKit LocalNet running
- Empty contract skeleton compiles

**Exit Criteria**:
- All 12 MVP ABI methods implemented in `contract.py`
- `algokit compile python smart_contracts/payroll_stream/contract.py` succeeds
- `pytest` passes with at least 1 test per ABI method (12+ tests)
- Deployment script (`scripts/deploy.py`) deploys ASA + contract to LocalNet
- Account setup script (`scripts/fund_accounts.py`) funds 3 test employees
- Contract deployed on LocalNet with 3 employees streaming

**Dependencies**: Sprint 0

**Risk Assessment**: MEDIUM -- Algorand Python compiler may have quirks with inner transactions or local state access patterns. Mitigation: test each method immediately after writing; use Context7 docs for algopy reference.

### Stories

| Story ID | Title | Complexity | FRs Covered |
|----------|-------|------------|-------------|
| STORY-1-001 | PAYUSD token creation and clawback configuration | M | FR-TOKEN-001, FR-TOKEN-002 |
| STORY-1-002 | Core contract: create, opt-in, fund, register | L | FR-CONTRACT-001, FR-CONTRACT-002, FR-CONTRACT-003, FR-CONTRACT-004, FR-CONTRACT-013 |
| STORY-1-003 | Streaming engine: withdraw, get_accrued, overdraft protection | L | FR-CONTRACT-005, FR-CONTRACT-006, FR-CONTRACT-014 |
| STORY-1-004 | Stream management: update_rate, pause, resume, remove, milestone_pay, pause_all | L | FR-CONTRACT-007, FR-CONTRACT-008, FR-CONTRACT-009, FR-CONTRACT-010, FR-CONTRACT-011, FR-CONTRACT-012 |
| STORY-1-005 | Employee opt-in flows and deployment scripts | M | FR-TOKEN-003, FR-TOKEN-004, FR-DEVOPS-001, FR-DEVOPS-002 |

---

## Sprint 2 -- Employer Dashboard

**Goal**: Build the complete employer dashboard with wallet connection, contract funding, employee registration (single + batch), employee list, stream management, milestone payments, emergency controls, contract health, and setup checklist.

**Estimated Effort**: 8-10 hours

**Entry Criteria**:
- Sprint 1 exit criteria met
- Contract deployed on LocalNet with working ABI methods
- At least 3 test accounts funded

**Exit Criteria**:
- Employer can connect wallet (KMD on LocalNet)
- Employer can fund contract via FundForm
- Employer can register employees (single and batch)
- Employee list shows live accrued amounts
- Employer can pause/resume/update rate/remove employees
- Employer can send milestone payments
- Emergency pause-all button works
- Contract health panel shows balance and runway
- Setup checklist guides first-time users
- `npx tsc --noEmit` passes with zero type errors

**Dependencies**: Sprint 1

**Risk Assessment**: MEDIUM -- Wallet integration with @txnlab/use-wallet-react and KMD provider may require debugging. Transaction signing flow (encode -> sign -> submit -> confirm) has multiple failure points. Mitigation: build wallet connection first and verify before building forms.

### Stories

| Story ID | Title | Complexity | FRs Covered |
|----------|-------|------------|-------------|
| STORY-2-001 | Frontend foundation: types, constants, algorand client, utilities | M | (Infrastructure supporting all EMPLOYER FRs) |
| STORY-2-002 | Wallet connection and contract state hooks | L | FR-EMPLOYER-001 |
| STORY-2-003 | Fund contract and register employees | L | FR-EMPLOYER-003, FR-EMPLOYER-004 |
| STORY-2-004 | Employee list with stream management actions | L | FR-EMPLOYER-005, FR-EMPLOYER-006 |
| STORY-2-005 | Milestone payments, emergency controls, contract health, setup checklist | L | FR-EMPLOYER-002, FR-EMPLOYER-007, FR-EMPLOYER-008, FR-EMPLOYER-009 |

---

## Sprint 3 -- Employee Dashboard, Landing Page, Shared UX & Demo Scripts

**Goal**: Build the employee dashboard with the signature streaming counter, withdrawal, transaction history, and rate display. Build the landing page with role routing. Implement shared UX (loading states, error handling, success toasts, network badge, explorer links). Create demo and reset scripts.

**Estimated Effort**: 8-10 hours

**Entry Criteria**:
- Sprint 2 exit criteria met
- Employer dashboard functional on LocalNet
- Wallet connection and contract interaction hooks working

**Exit Criteria**:
- Employee can connect wallet and see streaming counter ticking every second
- Employee can withdraw accrued salary with one click
- Transaction history shows past withdrawals with explorer links
- Rate display shows $/hr, $/day, $/week, $/month and "New" badge
- Landing page with How It Works diagram and role selection
- Role-based routing auto-detects employer vs employee
- Loading spinners shown during all async operations
- Error messages shown for all failure modes
- Success toasts with tx ID and explorer links after every action
- Network badge visible on all pages
- Demo script (`scripts/demo.py`) runs full 9-step flow
- Demo reset script (`scripts/reset.py`) provides clean state

**Dependencies**: Sprint 2

**Risk Assessment**: MEDIUM -- The StreamCounter real-time tick requires careful synchronization between client-side timer and on-chain state. Indexer queries for transaction history may be flaky on LocalNet. Mitigation: build counter with re-sync logic; use Algod for recent transactions if Indexer is unavailable.

### Stories

| Story ID | Title | Complexity | FRs Covered |
|----------|-------|------------|-------------|
| STORY-3-001 | Streaming counter and accrual hook | L | FR-EMPLOYEE-002 |
| STORY-3-002 | Employee dashboard: withdraw, history, rate display | L | FR-EMPLOYEE-001, FR-EMPLOYEE-003, FR-EMPLOYEE-004, FR-EMPLOYEE-005 |
| STORY-3-003 | Landing page, role routing, and shared navigation | M | FR-SHARED-001, FR-SHARED-002 |
| STORY-3-004 | Shared UX: loading states, error handling, toasts, network badge, explorer links | L | FR-SHARED-003, FR-SHARED-004, FR-SHARED-005, FR-SHARED-006, FR-SHARED-007 |
| STORY-3-005 | Demo script and demo reset script | M | FR-DEVOPS-003 |

---

## Sprint 4 -- Polish, Testnet Deploy & Stretch Goals

**Goal**: Deploy to Algorand Testnet, polish the dark theme with glassmorphism/spotlight/shimmer/Silk effects, handle timezone conversion, implement stretch features (resume_all, drain_funds) if time permits, and ensure the demo flow runs flawlessly.

**Estimated Effort**: 4-6 hours

**Entry Criteria**:
- Sprint 3 exit criteria met
- Full application working on LocalNet
- Demo script completes 9-step flow without errors

**Exit Criteria**:
- Contract deployed to Algorand Testnet
- Pera Wallet connects on Testnet
- Dark theme with glassmorphism cards, spotlight hover, shimmer text, Silk 3D background
- All timestamps display in browser local timezone
- Demo flow executes in under 3 minutes on Testnet
- Zero crashes during full demo walkthrough
- (STRETCH) resume_all() and drain_funds() implemented if time permits
- (STRETCH) CSV export if time permits

**Dependencies**: Sprint 3

**Risk Assessment**: LOW-MEDIUM -- Testnet deployment is straightforward but Testnet faucet limits may constrain account funding. Pera Wallet connection on Testnet needs testing. Design polish can expand unboundedly; must timebox. Mitigation: deploy to Testnet early in this sprint; pre-fund accounts; set strict 2-hour limit on design polish.

### Stories

| Story ID | Title | Complexity | FRs Covered |
|----------|-------|------------|-------------|
| STORY-4-001 | Testnet deployment and Pera Wallet integration | M | (Infrastructure -- Testnet variant of FR-DEVOPS-001, FR-EMPLOYER-001, FR-EMPLOYEE-001) |
| STORY-4-002 | Design polish: Silk background, spotlight cards, shimmer text, glassmorphism | L | FR-SHARED-007 |
| STORY-4-003 | Timezone handling and multi-unit rate display polish | S | (Polish for FR-EMPLOYEE-005, FR-SHARED-007) |
| STORY-4-004 | Stretch: resume_all, drain_funds, CSV export | M | FR-CONTRACT-015, FR-CONTRACT-016, FR-CONTRACT-017, FR-EMPLOYER-010, FR-DEVOPS-004 |
| STORY-4-005 | Demo rehearsal, bug fixes, and final verification | S | (Quality gate -- no new FRs) |
